name: The Bunker
about: The Bunker is an indoor golf simulator venue located in Barnesville, Minnesota, offering year-round, 24/7 access to golf simulation technology. The facility utilizes the Uneekor EYEXO system, which is designed to be precise and responsive, and provides access to over 100,000 virtual golf courses globally. The venue caters to golfers of all ages and skill levels, offering features for both full swing simulation and practice on putting and chipping greens, as well as a driving range mode. It is positioned as a convenient alternative to outdoor golf, allowing players to practice and play regardless of weather conditions.
why_golfers_like_it: Year-round, 24/7 indoor access regardless of weather
High-end Uneekor EYEXO simulator technology with precise shot tracking
Ability to play over 100,000 of the world's best golf courses
Data analysis tools to improve accuracy and mechanics

food_and_drink.notes: BYOB is allowed; no information on food preparation on-site.
BYOB is allowed; customers can bring their own alcoholic beverages.

simulator_hardware.notes: Used for full swing simulation, described as the most precise and responsive system available.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The venue description does not specify whether club rentals are available. It is recommended to call them or check their booking page for details on club rental policies.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue allows customers to bring their own food and beverages, including alcohol for BYOB.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: A typical 18-hole round can take up to 4 hours, but simulation times may vary.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, The Bunker is described as a place for golfers of all ages, making it a kid-friendly environment.
